description: A brokerage manager needs to audit a recently closed transaction file for compliance.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the transaction file for a specified property address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up the complete transaction folder with all documents.

nodes.task_description: Compare the documents in the file against the brokerage's required document checklist.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies that all required contracts, addenda, and disclosures are present and signed.

nodes.task_description: If any documents are missing, create a task for the agent of record to obtain them.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a missing addendum and assigns a task to the agent to upload it.
